node.statement: With omega=rho∘Phi a state and ||x||_omega^2=omega(x^2), P is an almost-contraction (||Px||_omega^2 <= ||x||_omega^2 + C eta ||x||^2) and Im P is almost-orthogonal to Ker P (|omega(u∘n)| <= C sqrt(eta) ||u|| ||n|| for u in Im P, n in Ker P); hence ||P(Px ∘ b) - P(x∘b)|| <= C sqrt(eta) ||x|| ||b|| for b in A.
